title: いけいけ☆ウララの新記録

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spirits are high at Tracen Academy's public scrimmage. Among them,
one student in particular is receiving a lot of attention.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara still trails behind the others, but one look at her face and
you know she's not giving up! Look at her go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It's not... over yet!

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text: That's it, Urara! Go!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's picking up speed, but it's no good! The other Umamusume are
still out of her reach! Will Haru Urara give up hope?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Never! Just... you... watch!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Finiiish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's growing popularity has nothing to do with her speed, or
even her form...

text_block_list.name: Neighbor Lady
text_block_list.text: Good job, Urara! You sure put up a fight on the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thanks! I might've lost, but I'll take home the gold next time
for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What garners people's attention is her unwavering resolve. No matter
how bitter the loss, she still marches on with a smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So? How'd I do? What was my time?
choice_data_list: A little slower than your best, I'm afraid...
A little slower than your best, I'm afraid...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! I coulda sworn I beat it! Oh well, guess I'll have to work
even harder at practice tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, could I have a moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a woman holding a camera approaches us. She hands me a
business card.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hm? "Umamusume Monthly"? You write for this magazine?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: That I do! And I've also been a fan of yours since the tryouts!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Ehehe, thanks for the support! Hm? Do you take pictures for
the magazine too?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Yes! I got some really nice shots of you running today!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Can I see?! What do I look like when I'm running?! Show me!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, all right, all right. I'll pick out a few especially nice shots and
send them your way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, we receive photographs from the reporter several
days later.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I look so cute in these! Ah, but look at how flared my nostrils
are in this one! Aw geez...
choice_data_list: She also wrote you a message of support.
She also wrote you a message of support.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... She's saying such nice things about me! Ehehe... Ah, she even
mentions you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
"Ever since you started working with your trainer, your smile's gotten
even brighter."

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
"That must be one heck of a trainer." Did you hear that?! She really
likes you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Same here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the only one people cheer for. If I do well, people will cheer
for you too...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Guess I have another reason to work hard!
